action: In Visual Studio Code, locate the blank area in the Explorer pane below the folder name 'CALCULATORAPP'. Right-click on this blank area and select 'New Folder'. Name this new folder 'src'. Then right-click on the newly created 'src' folder, select 'New File', and create a file named 'calculator_app.py'. Confirm successful creation of both the folder and the file.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task requires creating a new folder named 'src' in the Explorer pane under the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder in Visual Studio Code. To do this, I need to right-click on the blank area below the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder in the Explorer pane. The 'CALCULATORAPP' folder is visible in the Explorer pane (Box ID 46). I will right-click on this area to bring up the context menu.

previous action: I was instructed to right-click on the blank area below the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder in the Explorer pane. The current screen shows a context menu has appeared with options, which is the expected outcome. The next step is to select 'New Folder' from this context menu to create a new folder named 'src'. The 'New Folder' option is visible in the context menu.

previous action: I was instructed to left-click the 'New Folder' option in the context menu. The expected outcome is that a new folder input box appears in the Explorer pane, ready to be named. On the current screen, I see a new folder input field with the text 'New Folder' highlighted under the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder, indicating that the folder creation process is active and ready for renaming. The next step is to type the name 'src' to rename this folder.

previous action: I was instructed to type 'src' to rename the new folder. The expected outcome is that the new folder under 'CALCULATORAPP' is now named 'src'. On the current screen, I can see a folder named 'src' has appeared under 'CALCULATORAPP' in the Explorer pane, confirming the folder was created and named successfully. The next step is to right-click on the newly created 'src' folder to bring up the context menu, so I can select 'New File' and create 'calculator_app.py'. The 'src' folder is visible and selectable.

previous action: I was instructed to right-click on the newly created 'src' folder. The expected outcome is that a context menu appears for the 'src' folder. On the current screen, I see a context menu has appeared, which matches the expected result. The next step is to select 'New File' from this context menu to create a new file inside the 'src' folder.

previous action: I was instructed to left-click 'New File' in the context menu for the 'src' folder. The expected outcome is that an input field appears under the 'src' folder in the Explorer pane, allowing me to name the new file. On the current screen, I see an input box under the 'src' folder, ready for a filename to be entered. This matches the expected result. The next step is to type 'calculator_app.py' to name the new file.
